name: ESP32-S3-DevKitC-1
description: Espressif ESP32-S3-DevKitC-1 devkit with an ESP32-S3-WROOM-1 module, two 22-pin headers, USB-to-UART bridge and native USB-Serial-JTAG port.
notes: On-board addressable RGB LED on GPIO38 (board rev v1.1); the original revision uses GPIO48.
GPIO26-32 connect to the module's SPI flash and are not broken out to the headers.
GPIO35-37 are unavailable on modules with octal SPI flash/PSRAM (WROOM-1/1U octal, WROOM-2).
Header order verified against the official Espressif ESP32-S3-DevKitC-1 v1.1 user guide; header pin 1 is at the antenna end, indices here count from the USB end.
